title: Public Health Agency of Canada Addressing Misconduct and Wrongdoing Annual Reports - Canada.ca
content:
## Public Health Agency of Canada Addressing Misconduct and Wrongdoing Annual Reports
The annual Addressing Misconduct and Wrongdoing Reports reflect our ongoing efforts to foster a culture of transparency, accountability, and trust. By sharing insights into how we address employee concerns and complaints, we aim to increase awareness about existing supports and encourage employees to feel comfortable raising concerns.
- Public Health Agency of Canada Addressing Misconduct and Wrongdoing Report - 2024-2025
